## What does this PR do?
A clear, one-paragraph description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New technique added
- [ ] New worked example added
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Core command (`commands/enhance.md`) modification
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes do not include any API keys, secrets, or personal data
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I have tested the change in Claude Code (if applicable)
- [ ] If adding a technique, I have included a credible source

## Related issues
Closes #

## Additional notes
Anything reviewers should know.
